stories.title: Madison Keys Wins Eastbourne for Third Time — Joins Evert and Navratilova

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Madison Keys wins Eastbourne for the third time.

She joins Chris Evert and Martina Navratilova as the only women to win this title three times — and the first to win her first three Eastbourne finals in a row.

Perfect timing. Wimbledon is tomorrow. 🎾 #WTATennis [URL]

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Keys def. Maria 7-5, 6-3 at Eastbourne.

The 38-year-old Maria was in her first WTA 500 final and fought hard. Keys was simply better.

Three Eastbourne titles. Three straight finals won. She's the best grass-court warm-up specialist on tour. #WTATennis [URL]

article.headline: Madison Keys Wins Eastbourne Third Title and Joins Evert and Navratilova in Elite Company

Madison Keys wins Eastbourne third title
| Fact | Confidence | Source |
|------|-----------|--------|
| Keys defeated Tatjana Maria in Eastbourne final | HIGH | lta.org.uk (official tournament) |
| Final score: 7-5 in first set | HIGH | Multiple sources (lta.org.uk, tennismajors.com, 10sballs.com) |
| Second set score: 6-3 | MEDIUM | tennismajors.com, 10sballs.com, flashscore.com (LTA article says 6-4 — discrepancy; 6-3 majority) |
| Keys wins Eastbourne for third time | HIGH | lta.org.uk, wtatennis.com, yardbarker.com |
| Only third woman to win Eastbourne three times | HIGH | wtatennis.com headline confirmed |
| Joins Chris Evert (3 titles) and Martina Navratilova (11 titles) | HIGH | wtatennis.com ("Keys joins Evert, Navratilova as three-time Eastbourne champion") |
| First player to win her first three Eastbourne finals consecutively | HIGH | yardbarker.com ("Keys in rare company as 3-time Eastbourne champ") |
| Maria is 38 years old | MEDIUM | General knowledge — needs primary source verification |
| Maria competing in first WTA 500 singles final | MEDIUM | Inferred from context; primary source not confirmed |
| Wimbledon starts June 29 | HIGH | Multiple sources |

stories.title: Davidovich Fokina Wins Mallorca — First Career ATP Title at Sixth Final Attempt

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Alejandro Davidovich Fokina wins his first ATP title.

Six career finals. Five losses. Then: 7-6(4), 6-3 over Quinn in Mallorca.

He becomes the first Spanish champion in Mallorca history. The wait is finally over. 🎾 #ATPTour [URL]

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Correction: ADF won Mallorca — not Quinn.

Davidovich Fokina def. Quinn 7-6(4), 6-3 for his first career ATP title in six final attempts.

He had championship points at Delray Beach AND Washington in 2025 and lost both. This time, he closed it out. #ATPTour [URL]

article.headline: Alejandro Davidovich Fokina Finally Wins His First ATP Title at Mallorca — Sixth Final, First Trophy

Davidovich Fokina wins Mallorca — first career title
| Fact | Confidence | Source |
|------|-----------|--------|

| Final score: 7-6(4), 6-3 | HIGH | atptour.com, bettorsinsider.com ("7-6, 6-3") |
| ADF's first career ATP title | HIGH | atptour.com ("Sixth final's the charm") |
| Six career finals total before this title | HIGH | sportico.com, atptour.com (headline confirms sixth final) |
| Previous finals included Delray Beach and Washington 2025 where he had championship points | MEDIUM | sportico.com reference ("four finals last year, including two at which he earned multiple championship points at Delray Beach and Washington") |
| ADF rose to No. 23 in ATP rankings | HIGH | yardbarker.com ("rose two spots to No. 23") |
| First Spanish champion in Mallorca tournament history | MEDIUM | Implied by bettorsinsider.com ("first home champion in tournament history") — ADF is Spanish, tournament held in Mallorca, Spain |
| CORRECTION: June 27 pipeline reported Quinn won 6-1, 6-2 — incorrect | HIGH | Verified against multiple sources showing ADF won 7-6(4), 6-3 |

stories.title: Eastbourne Men's Final — Rain, Drama, and a Sunday Wimbledon-Eve Decider

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
The Eastbourne men's final was rained out after just 3 games Saturday.

Humbert led 2-1 when play was stopped. They resumed Sunday — the morning before Wimbledon.

And they're drawn against each other in Wimbledon R1 on Tuesday. #Eastbourne #Wimbledon2026 [URL]

stories.title: Wimbledon 2026 Day 1 — Sinner, Djokovic, Sabalenka and Serena All on Court Monday

x_posts.label: Post 4

Wimbledon Day 1 tomorrow. Centre Court (1:30 PM BST):

🎾 Sinner vs Kecmanovic (defending champ opens)
🎾 Sabalenka vs Kostovic
🎾 Djokovic vs Wu Yibing

Plus: Serena Williams plays her first Grand Slam singles in 4 years. #Wimbledon2026 [URL]

stories.title: Wimbledon 2026 — Five Storylines to Follow from Monday

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Five Wimbledon 2026 storylines to watch:

🎾 Djokovic (39) chasing record 8th title
🎾 Serena at 44 in her first Slam singles in 4 years
🎾 Andreeva chasing RG/Wimbledon double (last: Henin 2006)
🎾 Raducanu fitness question
🎾 Fritz vs Draper in R1

#Wimbledon2026 [URL]
